title: Crunchy Crispy Jamaican Snappy Hash
description: A fatty, snappy, monsoon-inspired Jamaican dish featuring puff pastry and infused oil, easily made jain-friendly by substituting traditional sausage with vegan alternatives. This dish is best served with a side of steamed vegetables or a simple salad.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut the pastry into 4 equal squares.
Place 1/4 cup of infused oil on each square, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Add 1 vegan sausage, 1/4 onion, and 1/4 bell pepper to each square.
Fold the pastry squares in half to enclose the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the hash on the preheated iron teppan and cook for 4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Repeat with the remaining pastry and filling.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped scotch bonnet peppers if desired.
